js:
document.querySelector('.reserve').addEventListener('click', function() { alert('Rezervasyon için: +90 212 XXX XX XX\nveya info@beluga.com'); });
document.querySelectorAll('.menu-item').forEach(item => { item.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { this.style.paddingLeft = '12px'; this.style.transition = 'padding 0.3s'; }); item.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { this.style.paddingLeft = '0'; }); });
